findings.issue: Learning gap closure incomplete - weights update tied to task completion, but no explicit DIF analysis or bias detection for AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Implement DIF analysis for question pool and integrate bias detection for AZ/CIS test-takers

findings.issue: Self-check loop may create noise if not properly filtered - potential for unnecessary tasks
findings.recommended_fix: Introduce filtering for self-check loop to minimize noise and ensure only relevant tasks are created

findings.issue: Safe executors lack explicit blast radius assessment - potential risk if not thoroughly tested
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough testing and assessment of blast radius for safe executors to ensure safety
